title: P_Economia
description: Plugin Economia! Feito para seu servidor ter a melhor economia! com varias Moedas!, Economy Plugin! Made for your server to have the best economy! with multiple Currencies!
body:
# đź’° P_Economia  
Plugin de Economia para **Minecraft**

**P_Economia** Ă© um plugin robusto para servidores Minecraft que implementa um sistema de economia **com mĂşltiplas moedas, rankings dinĂ˘micos, menus interativos, integraĂ§ĂŁo com Vault e PlaceholderAPI, cheques e displays de holograma**.  
Foi desenvolvido com foco em **performance, personalizaĂ§ĂŁo e escalabilidade**, ideal para servidores que buscam uma economia avanĂ§ada.  

---

## đźš€ Funcionalidades

âś… **MĂşltiplas Moedas** â€“ totalmente configurĂˇveis (nome, sĂ­mbolo, saldo inicial, tags de magnata).  
đź“Š **Rankings DinĂ˘micos** â€“ atualizaĂ§ĂŁo automĂˇtica, com hologramas e armor stands.  
đź”— **IntegraĂ§ĂŁo com Vault** â€“ compatibilidade com outros plugins de economia.  
đź”§ **IntegraĂ§ĂŁo com PlaceholderAPI** â€“ placeholders personalizĂˇveis para chats, scoreboards e mais.  
đź–Ąď¸Ź **Menus Interativos** â€“ GUI para saldo, preferĂŞncias, histĂłrico e configuraĂ§Ăµes.  
đź“„ **Sistema de Cheques** â€“ crie e resgate cheques fĂ­sicos com valores em moedas.  
đź’¬ **Mensagens PersonalizĂˇveis** â€“ suporte a chat, action bar e tĂ­tulos (ativĂˇveis/desativĂˇveis por jogador).  
đź‘¤ **Skins Personalizadas** â€“ compatĂ­vel com SkinsRestorer para exibir skins nos rankings.  
đź—„ď¸Ź **Banco de Dados** â€“ armazenamento persistente de saldos, transaĂ§Ăµes e configs.  

---

## đź“¦ Requisitos

- âšˇ **Vault** *(opcional, mas recomendado)*  
- đź“ś **PlaceholderAPI** *(para placeholders personalizados)*  
- đźŽ­ **SkinsRestorer** *(para skins em displays de ranking)*  

---

## âš™ď¸Ź ConfiguraĂ§ĂŁo

Arquivos gerados automaticamente em:  
`/plugins/P_Economy/`

- `config.yml` â†’ ConfiguraĂ§Ăµes gerais.  
- `currencies.yml` â†’ DefiniĂ§ĂŁo das moedas.  
- `commands.yml` â†’ ConfiguraĂ§ĂŁo de comandos.  
- `menus.yml` â†’ ConfiguraĂ§ĂŁo dos menus interativos.  
- `Idiomas/pt_br.yml` e `Idiomas/en_us.yml` â†’ TraduĂ§Ăµes e mensagens.  

---

## âŚ¨ď¸Ź Comandos Principais

| Comando | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | PermissĂŁo |
|---------|------------|-----------|
| `/economia saldo [moeda]` | Exibe o saldo do jogador. | `peconomy.use` |
| `/economia top [moeda]` | Mostra o top 10 jogadores. | `peconomy.use` |
| `/economia toggle [moeda]` | Ativa/desativa recebimento. | `peconomy.use` |
| `/economia transacoes [moeda]` | HistĂłrico de transaĂ§Ăµes. | `peconomy.use` |
| `/economia message_prefs` | Menu de preferĂŞncias de mensagens. | `peconomy.use` |
| `/economia cheque <valor> <moeda>` | Cria um cheque. | `peconomy.cheque` |
| `/economia reload` | Recarrega configs. | `peconomy.admin` |
| `/economia add/remove/set` | Gerencia saldo de jogadores. | `peconomy.admin` |

---

## đź”‘ PermissĂµes

- `peconomy.use` â†’ Comandos bĂˇsicos.  
- `peconomy.admin` â†’ Comandos administrativos.  
- `peconomy.cheque` â†’ Criar/resgatar cheques.  
- `peconomy.customcommands` â†’ Executar comandos personalizados nos menus.  

---

## đźŞ„ Placeholders (PlaceholderAPI)

```txt
%peconomy_balance_<moeda>%       â†’ "$100.00"
%peconomy_magnata_<moeda>%       â†’ "[Magnata]"
%peconomy_toggle_<moeda>%        â†’ "Enabled/Disabled"

%peconomy_title%                 â†’ "Enabled/Disabled"

```
# đź’° P_Economia  
Economy Plugin for **Minecraft**

**P_Economia** is a robust plugin for Minecraft servers that implements an economy system **with multiple currencies, dynamic leaderboards, interactive menus, Vault and PlaceholderAPI integration, checks, and hologram displays**.  
It was developed with a focus on **performance, customization, and scalability**, making it ideal for servers looking for an advanced economy system.  

---

## đźš€ Features

âś… **Multiple Currencies** â€“ fully configurable (name, symbol, starting balance, magnate tags).  
đź“Š **Dynamic Leaderboards** â€“ automatic updates, with holograms and armor stands.  
đź”— **Vault Integration** â€“ compatibility with other economy plugins.  
đź”§ **PlaceholderAPI Integration** â€“ customizable placeholders for chats, scoreboards, and more.  
đź–Ąď¸Ź **Interactive Menus** â€“ GUI for balance, preferences, history, and settings.  
đź“„ **Check System** â€“ create and redeem physical checks with currency values.  
đź’¬ **Customizable Messages** â€“ support for chat, action bar, and titles (enable/disable per player).  
đź‘¤ **Custom Skins** â€“ compatible with SkinsRestorer to display skins on leaderboards.  
đź—„ď¸Ź **Database** â€“ persistent storage of balances, transactions, and configs.  

---

## đź“¦ Requirements

- âšˇ **Vault** *(optional, but recommended)*  
- đź“ś **PlaceholderAPI** *(for custom placeholders)*  
- đźŽ­ **SkinsRestorer** *(for leaderboard display skins)*  

---

## âš™ď¸Ź Configuration

Files are automatically generated in:  
`/plugins/P_Economy/`

- `config.yml` â†’ General settings.  
- `currencies.yml` â†’ Currency definitions.  
- `commands.yml` â†’ Command configuration.  
- `menus.yml` â†’ Interactive menu configuration.  
- `Languages/pt_br.yml` and `Languages/en_us.yml` â†’ Translations and messages.  

---

## âŚ¨ď¸Ź Main Commands

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---------|-------------|------------|
| `/economy balance [currency]` | Displays the playerâ€™s balance. | `peconomy.use` |
| `/economy top [currency]` | Shows the top 10 players. | `peconomy.use` |
| `/economy toggle [currency]` | Enables/disables receiving. | `peconomy.use` |
| `/economy transactions [currency]` | Transaction history. | `peconomy.use` |
| `/economy message_prefs` | Message preferences menu. | `peconomy.use` |
| `/economy check <amount> <currency>` | Creates a check. | `peconomy.cheque` |
| `/economy reload` | Reloads configs. | `peconomy.admin` |
| `/economy add/remove/set` | Manage player balances. | `peconomy.admin` |

---

## đź”‘ Permissions

- `peconomy.use` â†’ Basic commands.  
- `peconomy.admin` â†’ Administrative commands.  
- `peconomy.cheque` â†’ Create/redeem checks.  
- `peconomy.customcommands` â†’ Execute custom commands in menus.  

---

## đźŞ„ Placeholders (PlaceholderAPI)

```txt
%peconomy_balance_<currency>%        â†’ "$100.00"
%peconomy_magnate_<currency>%        â†’ "[Magnate]"
%peconomy_toggle_<currency>%         â†’ "Enabled/Disabled"
%peconomy_actionbar%                 â†’ "Enabled/Disabled"
%peconomy_title%                     â†’ "Enabled/Disabled"
%peconomy_lasttransaction_<currency>% â†’ "ADD $50 Steve"
%peconomy_top_<currency>_<position>_<type>%
